reasoning: The document displays high text fidelity according to programmatic metrics (recall 0.969), but the LLM fidelity evaluation flagged two major defects: a broken heading hierarchy that skips the H2 level and the loss of a meaningful content-bearing image on page 3. Since the fidelity composite score (0.8443) falls below the 0.85 auto-approval threshold and signals disagree on routing, the cost-asymmetry rule dictates an escalation to ensure accessibility and content completeness.

concerns.analysis: The document structure skips heading levels. The top-level title 'Monthly Cybersecurity Newsletter' is defined as the section title (effectively H1), but all primary sub-sections within the document ('Enterprise Security and Risk Management Office (ESRMO)', 'From the Desk of the State Chief Risk Officer – Maria Thompson', and 'Resources to Remember') are assigned level H3. There are no H2 heading elements present in the body to maintain a logical hierarchical progression for screen reader users.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: Major subheadings on Page 1: 'Enterprise Security and Risk Management Office (ESRMO)' and 'From the Desk of the State Chief Risk Officer – Maria Thompson'. Major subheading on Page 3: 'Resources to Remember'.
concerns.output_quote: The JSON contains multiple H3 headers without a preceding H2 in the section body: "type": "heading", "level": 3, "text": "Enterprise Security and Risk Management Office (ESRMO)" (heading-1); "type": "heading", "level": 3, "text": "From the Desk of the State Chief Risk Officer – Maria Thompson" (heading-2); "type": "heading", "level": 3, "text": "Resources to Remember" (heading-3).

concerns.analysis: A meaningful image containing text ('My idea is...') from page 3 of the source PDF is missing in the HTML output. This image serves as a visual anchor and provides context for the section inviting suggestions from security professionals. Other logos and images (NC Information Technology logo, 'This year I will...' list, PCI DSS logo, 'Learn' key, CEB logo) are correctly present.
concerns.source_pdf_quote: An image of a lightbulb with bubbles containing the text 'My idea is....' on page 3.
concerns.output_quote: The image is entirely absent; the section begins directly with the text 'Lastly, we encourage all security professionals...'
concerns.location: Page 3, section regarding call for topics/suggestions

action_items: Verify if the text within the missing 'My idea is...' image is captured elsewhere or if the image needs to be restored with alt-text.
Restructure the HTML heading levels to follow a logical H1-H2-H3 progression for accessibility compliance.
